finding.title: Use a Qualifications Summary / Key Features / Professional P...
finding.message: Replace objective with a summary that sells your qualifications and personal brand for this role.
finding.whyItMatters: Objectives are outdated and self-focused. Modern summaries act as a branded headline that immediately shows fit and hooks the scanner. Resume Magic contrasts traditional Objective vs. Qualifications Summary.
finding.suggestedFix: 3-5 lines: Role + years + key strengths + 1-2 quantified proof points + unique value/brand.

finding.evidenceSnippet: I was tasked with writing documentation and I also participated in code reviews for my team members regularly. Beta LLC
finding.title: Write in implied first person: no 'I', 'me', 'my' anywhere o...
finding.message: Remove all first-person pronouns. Rewrite sentences to start with the action or result.
finding.whyItMatters: First person is redundant (the document is about you) and wastes characters/scan attention. Professional convention across nearly all US corporate resumes is implied first person. 'I' stands out negatively in scans.
finding.suggestedFix: Change 'I led a team of 5 that delivered...' to 'Led 5-person team delivering...'.

finding.title: Omit 'References available upon request' and any references ...
finding.message: Remove the references line – it takes up valuable space and isn't necessary.
finding.whyItMatters: Wastes space; employers assume you have them and will ask when needed. Modern practice is to prepare separate list.
finding.suggestedFix: Delete it; have a separate references document ready if requested.
